rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies a real proof-quality issue on line 73: `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` uses the default simp set rather than `simp only`, making it brittle to future simp-set changes. Review 2 missed this entirely and gave an approve with no findings. The finding is grounded in the diff and addresses proof robustness, which is core to this rubric angle.
